In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], an '''attack''' was launched on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bpfassh]], along with two other nearby [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] in the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]], by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to lure the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] to Bpfassh. Thrawn hoped that, by luring the fleet to one central area, he could steal the unguarded derelict [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] located at Sluis Van with [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]] stolen from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] [[Nomad City|mining operation]] on [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]].

Thrawn's maneuvers did lure the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] towards a dead end, and the [[Imperial Remnant|Empire]] attacked the Sluis Van shipyards, after [[Raid on Nomad City|stealing the mole miners]]. However, this attack was thwarted.

{{Battle-stub}}
